full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #52 (2026-06-04)

PULSE
Health: 0.6019 (B). 1036 wallets, 295 contributors. 71 memos today vs 107 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
59 reward payments, 301824 PFT distributed to 24 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (54267 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 3,500 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,500 PFT). Lowest: rKjozZ...kf4u (0 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (23,700 PFT, avg 3,386/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rhwiJx...2TaE (53 memos). Fastest new contributor: rU963x...fyUj (8.5 memos/day in 4 days). 22 new wallet(s) this week. 60 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 70.8%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-05): 183 transactions from 28 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
